name: pipe_created_powershell_alternate_host_pipe
raw_query: any where file.name:"\\PSHost*" and (not (((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7-preview\\pwsh.exe*", "*:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\system32\\dsac.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\system32\\inetsrv\\w3wp.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\sdiagnhost.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\system32\\ServerManager.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\system32\\wbem\\wmiprvse.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\wsmprovhost.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell_ise.exe*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe*")) or (process.executable:"*C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.PowerShellPreview*" and process.executable:"*\\pwsh.exe*") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.PowerShellPreview*" and process.executable:"*\\pwsh.exe*")) or (?process.executable == null))) and (not (((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\Microsoft SQL Server\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Tools\\Binn\\SQLPS.exe") or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files\\AzureConnectedMachineAgent\\GCArcService*" and process.executable:"*\\GC\\gc_worker.exe") or process.executable:"C:\\Program Files\\Citrix\\*" or process.executable:"C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Exchange Server\\*"))
